scripts.dev: npm run build:native-helpers && npm run build:verifier && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on tcp:5173 dist/main/main.js && cross-env QUICK_STUDY_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && npm run build:native-helpers && npm run build:verifier
scripts.build:native-helpers: mkdir -p dist/helpers && xcrun swiftc native/source-index-extractor.swift -o dist/helpers/source-index-extractor -framework AppKit -framework PDFKit -framework Vision && xcrun swiftc native/source-bookmark-helper.swift -o dist/helpers/source-bookmark-helper -framework Foundation
scripts.quality:gate:beta: npm run quality:assemble:beta && npm run quality:gate -- --benchmark evaluation/benchmarks/v2/benchmark.json --evidence test-results/release-quality-gate/evidence.json --out test-results/release-quality-gate
scripts.test:smoke: node scripts/install-beta-for-smoke.mjs && npm run test:smoke:index-budget && npm run test:smoke:functional
scripts.test:smoke:index-budget: playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --grep "packaged Quick Study indexes the pinned large-source corpus within budget"
scripts.test:smoke:functional: playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts --grep-invert "packaged Quick Study indexes the pinned large-source corpus within budget"
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run quality:gate:fixture && npm run package && npm run make:beta && npm run test:smoke
